title: Utility of clinical exome sequencing in a complex Emirati pediatric cohort.
author: Mahfouz NA Kizhakkedath P Ibrahim A El Naofal M Ramaswamy S Harilal D Qutub Y Uddin M Taylor A Alloub Z AlBanna A Abuhammour W Fathalla B Tayoun AA
content: S-EPMC7200174 PMC7200174 Utility of clinical exome sequencing in a complex Emirati pediatric cohort. Clinical exome sequencing (CES) has become a routine diagnostic tool in several pediatric subspecialties, with a reported average diagnostic yield of ~25% in this patient poulation. The utility
